sections.title: Active Epics
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Epic AND status != Done

powers.label: Generate PRD
powers.prompt: Generate a Product Requirements Document for epic {key} "{summary}". Include objectives, user stories, acceptance criteria, and success metrics.

powers.label: Break Down
powers.prompt: Break down epic {key} "{summary}" into user stories with acceptance criteria.

sections.title: Unrefined Stories
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Story AND status = Open

powers.label: Refine
powers.prompt: Refine story {key} "{summary}". Add detailed acceptance criteria, edge cases, and technical notes.

powers.label: Estimate
powers.prompt: Estimate {key} "{summary}" using story points. Consider complexity, uncertainty, and effort.

powers.label: Gap Analysis
powers.prompt: Analyze requirements gaps in the current sprint for {prefix}. Identify missing acceptance criteria, unclear scope, or untested scenarios.
